(VIA ZOOM) FOR DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER KIREN & COMPASS CALIFORNIA II -- DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER KIREN & COMPASS CALIFORNIA II'S MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/10/25 IS CONTINUED TO 7/14/25 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DEADLINE WILL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE.
